zh-CN.name: 相机
zh-CN.intro: 相机就像一个魔法盒子，能把看到的东西变成照片。它有圆圆的镜头，还有一个小屏幕，按下按钮就能拍照啦！

story.title: 📷小相机的第一次旅行
story.body: 小相机第一次跟主人去公园，它好兴奋呀！看到小花，咔擦！小花在照片里笑；看到小狗，咔擦！小狗摇尾巴；看到小朋友吹泡泡，咔擦！泡泡变成彩色的圆球。小相机说：我要把美丽的世界都装进肚子里！主人笑着说：你真是个小魔法师。晚上回到家，小相机把照片一张张吐出来，每一张都是快乐的回忆。它开心地想：明天还要拍更多更多的照片！

knowledge.title: 相机为什么能拍照？
knowledge.body: 相机前面有个镜头，像眼睛一样看东西。按下按钮，光线跑进相机里，把看到的画面记录在小小的芯片上，就变成一张照片啦。有些相机还能拍会动的视频哦。

en.name: Camera
en.intro: A camera is like a magic box that turns what you see into a picture. It has a round lens and a small screen. Press the button and it takes a photo!

story.title: 📷Little Camera's First Trip
story.body: Little Camera went to the park for the very first time. It was so excited! It saw a flower—click! The flower smiled in the photo. It saw a puppy—click! The puppy wagged its tail. It saw children blowing bubbles—click! The bubbles turned into colorful balls. Little Camera said, I want to keep all the beautiful world inside me! Its owner laughed and said, You are a little magician. At night, Little Camera showed all the photos, each a happy memory. It thought happily, Tomorrow I will take even more pictures!

knowledge.title: How does a camera take pictures?
knowledge.body: A camera has a lens in front, like an eye. When you press the button, light goes into the camera and records the picture on a tiny chip. Then you have a photo! Some cameras can also take moving videos.
